---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability — describe the problem and outcome, not the implementation.
title: "feat: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

<!-- One line per block. Do not hard-wrap prose. WHAT and WHY, not HOW. -->

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve, and for whom? Why now? -->

## Desired outcome

<!-- What does success look like? What changes for the user? -->

## Spec mapping

<!-- Pick one. SDD flow: every feature is driven by a spec. -->
- [ ] Extends an existing spec: `specs/NNN-slug` (requirement(s): FR-XX)
- [ ] New spec needed (run `scripts/new-feature.sh <slug>` then `/specify`)

## Acceptance criteria (draft)

> Each becomes a failing test first (TDD), then implementation.

- [ ] Given _(context)_, when _(action)_, then _(verifiable result)_.

## Out of scope

<!-- What this explicitly does NOT cover. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, sketches, prior art. -->
